text:
EXPLANATION: AlpacaEval is a well-known open-source project and evaluation framework maintained by the Tatsu Lab at Stanford; the cited authors are researchers associated with the lab and the development of the framework. As this is a software/benchmark project rather than a traditional academic paper with a static list of authors, the citation is valid and refers to the correct project homepage.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/alpaca_eval
FOUND_TITLE: AlpacaEval: An Automatic Evaluator of Instruction-following Models
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tatsu Lab
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
